# Sample Markdown Document

## Overview

This is a Markdown document for testing the RAG chunking system. It contains various Markdown elements to ensure proper handling.

## Features

### Feature 1: Lists

- Item 1
- Item 2
- Item 3

1. Ordered item 1
2. Ordered item 2
3. Ordered item 3

### Feature 2: Tables

| Column 1 | Column 2 | Column 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Data 1   | Data 2   | Data 3   |
| Data 4   | Data 5   | Data 6   |

### Feature 3: Links and Images

[Link to documentation](https://example.com)

### Feature 4: Blockquotes

> This is a blockquote.
> It can span multiple lines.

## Code Examples

```python
def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")
    return True
```

```java
public class Main {
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        System.out.println("Hello, World!");
    }
}
```

## Formatting

**Bold text** and *italic text* and `inline code`.

## Conclusion

This document tests Markdown parsing and chunking capabilities.
